mapper.select:
SELECT A.RECOMEND_SITE_ID , A.RECOMEND_SITE_URL , A.RECOMEND_SITE_NM , A.RECOMEND_SITE_DC , A.RECOMEND_RESN_CN , A.RECOMEND_CONFM_AT , A.CONFM_DE , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID , TO_CHAR(A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS LAST_UPDT_PNTTM , A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID FROM TB_RECOMEND_SITE_INFO A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.RECOMEND_SITE_NM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_RECOMEND_SITE_INFO A WHERE 1=1

SELECT A.RECOMEND_SITE_ID , A.RECOMEND_SITE_URL , A.RECOMEND_SITE_NM , A.RECOMEND_SITE_DC , A.RECOMEND_RESN_CN , A.RECOMEND_CONFM_AT , A.CONFM_DE , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID , TO_CHAR(A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS LAST_UPDT_PNTTM , A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID FROM TB_RECOMEND_SITE_INFO A WHERE A.RECOMEND_SITE_ID = #{recomendSiteId}
